parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor with natural facial expressions, fluid body movements, and realistic lighting. There are no uncanny artifacts typical of AI generation, such as distorted fingers or unnatural eye movements.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, light brown complexion. He has dark hair, a goatee, and wears round gold-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a black beanie, a dark teal t-shirt, and a gold chain necklace.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, clothes hanging in background, natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a close-up, selfie-style shot. He is looking directly at the camera and gesturing with his right hand, pointing his index finger up. The background is slightly out of focus, showing a room with clothes hanging on a rack and a plain wall.

scenes.visual_description: A young man is speaking directly to the camera in a close-up shot. He is wearing a beanie, glasses, and a t-shirt. The background is slightly out of focus, showing some hanging clothes. Text overlays appear as he speaks.

scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hey Thijs, thanks again for meeting with me over lunch today. Really enjoyed that sinigang you made. Would you be free to do the same thing next week on Tuesday? No wait, uh, actually, um, Wednesday at four... sorry, actually 4:30? Let me know if this works for you. Thanks again. Blessings, Bryce.
Character A says: Look at that. In seconds. Usually I would have to fix the name, take out the errors, reformat the whole thing, but not anymore. This did it all for me.
